command.text: select case when rtrim(val) = '1' then '1' else '0' end as view_index from options where name = 'm_gt_dvcs'

field.name: ma_dvcs
field.check: ma_dvcs not in (select ma_dvcs from dmdvcs where status = '1')⩓ma_dvcs in (select distinct ma_dvcs from dmdvcsks where ngay_ks >= @dateCurrent)⩓ma_dvcs not in (select distinct ma_dvcs from sysunitrights where user_id = @@userID and r_new = 1)
field.condition: if @costUnit = '1' begin⩓if @costUnit = '1' begin⩓if @costUnit = '1' begin if @@admin <> 1 begin

field.name: ma_vt
field.check: ma_vt not in (select ma_vt from dmvt)

field.name: ma_vt0
field.check: (ma_vt0 not in (select ma_vt from dmvt)) or (ma_vt0 = ma_vt)

field.name: ma_vt
field.check: ma_vt not in (select ma_vt from dmvt)

field.name: ma_vt0
field.check: (ma_vt0 not in (select ma_vt from dmvt)) or (ma_vt0 = ma_vt)

field.name: ma_dvcs
field.check: ma_dvcs not in (select ma_dvcs from dmdvcs where status = '1')⩓ma_dvcs in (select distinct ma_dvcs from dmdvcsks where ngay_ks >= @dateCurrent)⩓ma_dvcs not in (select distinct ma_dvcs from sysunitrights where user_id = @@userID and r_new = 1)
field.condition: if @costUnit = '1' begin⩓if @costUnit = '1' begin⩓if @costUnit = '1' begin if @@admin <> 1 begin
